finding_results.notes: Rewrote the two flagged exchanges to separate idiolect under pressure: Ina now self-corrects explicitly in-line (qualifier drop and reset), while Minjae responds in concrete operational terms (transfer failure, route freeze, burn-word protocol). Removed mirrored metaphor pairing and reduced polished aphoristic symmetry.

summary: Revised targeted dialogue to restore voice separation and pressure-true cadence: Ina's stressed analytic self-revision now contrasts with Minjae's logistics-grounded framing in both flagged exchanges, with contractions and colloquial pressure preserved.
